name: Guard Room
description: A small chamber hewn from the rock. Arrows are scattered across the floor. {{combat_update}}
ambient: The air is thick with dust and the smell of old leather.
A quiver of arrows hangs on the wall, mostly empty.
combat_won_snippet: The skeleton archer collapses into a pile of bones. The room falls silent. You might search the remains.

objects.name: archer remains
objects.description: The shattered bones of the skeleton archer lie scattered.
objects.description_snippet: Broken bones and a snapped bow lie on the floor.

on_interact.search: You rummage through the remains and find a few usable items.
on_interact.look: The archer's bones are brittle, its bow broken.
